question_en: Becoming a Pilot is very expensive. Is the investment worth it in 2026?
question_hi_hinglish: Pilot banna bahut mehenga hai. Kya 2026 mein itna paisa lagana sahi hai?
answer_en: Yes, but only with a plan. While the training costs ₹80L-1Cr, the starting salary for a First Officer is ₹2L-3L per month. With the massive expansion of airlines in India (Air India/Indigo), the demand is at an all-time high. We recommend 'Cadet Pilot Programs' where airlines sponsor your training and guarantee a job.
answer_hi_hinglish: Haan, par planning zaroori hai. Training mein ₹80L-1Cr lagte hain, par shuruati salary ₹2L-3L mahina hoti hai. India mein airlines tezi se badh rahi hain, isliye demand bahut zyada hai. Hum 'Cadet Pilot Programs' ki salah dete hain jahan airline khud training ka kharcha uthati hai aur job ki guarantee deti hai.

question_en: Is Merchant Navy a safe and stable career? How is the salary?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya Merchant Navy ek safe career hai? Isme salary kitni milti hai?
answer_en: Merchant Navy is a high-adventure, high-pay career. A Deck Cadet starts at ₹40k-60k (stipend), but a Captain can earn ₹10L+ per month, often tax-free. It requires staying away from home for 6-9 months, so it is best for students who love travel and a disciplined lifestyle.
answer_hi_hinglish: Merchant Navy mein paisa aur adventure dono bahut hain. Cadet ki shuruat ₹40k-60k se hoti hai, par Captain ki salary ₹10L se upar ho sakti hai, jo aksar tax-free hoti hai. Isme 6-9 mahine ghar se door rehna padta hai, isliye ye un baccho ke liye best hai jinhe travel aur discipline pasand hai.

question_en: Is Psychology just for doctors? Can an Arts student become a Therapist?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya Psychology sirf doctors ke liye hai? Kya Arts student Therapist ban sakta hai?
answer_en: Yes! An Arts student can do a B.A. and then an M.A. in Psychology to become a Counselor or Therapist. In 2026, every school, corporate office, and hospital in cities like Raipur needs mental health experts. It is a highly respected and growing field with a huge urban demand.
answer_hi_hinglish: Ji haan! Arts student B.A. aur M.A. Psychology karke Counselor ban sakta hai. 2026 mein Raipur jaise shehron ke har school, office aur hospital mein mental health experts ki zaroorat hai. Ye ek bahut hi sammanit field hai jiski demand shehron mein tezi se badh rahi hai.

question_en: Is traditional Journalism dying? What is the future of Digital Media?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya purani Journalism khatam ho rahi hai? Digital Media ka kya future hai?
answer_en: Traditional TV/Newspapers are changing, but 'Content' is booming. Today, Journalists work for digital platforms, host Podcasts, and manage Social Media News. If your child has a nose for news and good communication, they can work for big digital houses or even start their own local news portal.
answer_hi_hinglish: Purane tarike badal rahe hain, par news ki demand badh gayi hai. Aaj kal Journalists digital platforms, Podcasts aur Social Media ke liye kaam karte hain. Agar bacche ki communication acchi hai, toh wo bade digital groups mein ya khud ka news portal shuru karke accha career bana sakta hai.

question_en: My child has a great voice. Is Radio Jockeying (RJ) a good full-time job?
question_hi_hinglish: Mere bacche ki awaaz bahut acchi hai. Kya RJ banna ek acchi full-time job hai?
answer_en: Being an RJ is great, but in 2026, it is part of a larger 'Audio Industry.' They can be RJs, Voice-over Artists for ads, or Podcast Producers. With FM stations in Raipur and Bilaspur and global apps like Spotify/Audible, a good voice is a major financial asset.
answer_hi_hinglish: RJ banna accha hai, par ab ye 'Audio Industry' ka hissa hai. Baccha RJ ke saath-saath Voice-over artist ya Podcast Producer bhi ban sakta hai. Raipur-Bilaspur ke FM stations aur Spotify jaise apps ki wajah se acchi awaaz ki aaj kal bahut demand aur paisa hai.

question_en: Is Civil Engineering still relevant with so many computers around?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya computer ke zamane mein bhi Civil Engineering ki value hai?
answer_en: Absolutely. Computers cannot build bridges or roads. With India's focus on infrastructure (Gati Shakti) and new smart cities in Chhattisgarh, Civil Engineers are needed more than ever. They now use modern tools like 3D Mapping and AI to plan construction, making it a high-tech field.
answer_hi_hinglish: Bilkul! Bridge ya sadak computer nahi bana sakta. India mein infrastructure aur smart cities (jaise Naya Raipur) ke aane se Civil Engineers ki demand bahut hai. Ab wo 3D Mapping aur AI jaise modern tools use karte hain, jisse ye field ab kaafi high-tech ho gayi hai.

question_en: What is the scope of Mining Engineering specifically in Chhattisgarh?
question_hi_hinglish: Chhattisgarh mein Mining Engineering ka kya scope hai?
answer_en: Chhattisgarh is a mining hub. Mining Engineers are the highest-paid professionals in companies like SECL, NMDC, and BALCO. It often leads to stable, high-paying government or semi-govt jobs with great residential facilities. It is one of the best branches for students in our state.
answer_hi_hinglish: Chhattisgarh mining ka gadh hai. SECL, NMDC aur BALCO jaisi companies mein Mining Engineers ki salary sabse zyada hoti hai. Isme aksar stable govt ya semi-govt naukri milti hai jahan rehne ki acchi suvidha milti hai. Hamare state ke students ke liye ye best branches mein se ek hai.

question_en: Is Computer Science (CS) the only branch with high salaries?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya sirf Computer Science (CS) mein hi high salary milti hai?
answer_en: CS currently has the most jobs, but it is also the most crowded. Branches like 'Core Electrical' or 'Mining' have less competition and offer similar salaries in specialized roles. Don't choose CS just for the money; choose it if your child actually loves coding and logic.
answer_hi_hinglish: CS mein jobs zyada hain, par wahan bheed bhi bahut hai. 'Mining' ya 'Electrical' jaise branches mein competition kam hai aur specialized roles mein salary barabar milti hai. Sirf paise ke liye CS na chunein; tabhi chunein agar bacche ko coding aur logic mein interest ho.
